description_long: This is a vintage-style mechanical alarm clock with a round, metal body painted in a weathered red finish, showing signs of age and wear. The front features a circular, slightly yellowed clock face with black Arabic numerals and two black hands, protected by a glass cover. Two prominent metal bells sit on top, separated by a sturdy, arched handle, and a hammer mechanism is positioned between them for the alarm function. The back of the clock displays several metal knobs and levers for setting the time and alarm, as well as a winding key, all mounted on a metallic backplate. The clock stands on two short, angled metal legs, providing stability on flat surfaces. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, evoking a sense of classic, early-to-mid 20th-century craftsmanship.
description: A weathered, red metal vintage alarm clock with twin bells, a round face with Arabic numerals, and a sturdy arched handle. The clock shows signs of age and features several knobs and levers on the back.
description_view_0: The back view reveals the metallic backplate with multiple knobs, levers, and a winding key, as well as the base of the bells and handle.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the curved, cylindrical body, the protruding bells, and the arched handle, with visible wear on the red paint.
description_view_2: The front view displays the clock face with Arabic numerals, two black hands, and the glass cover, as well as the twin bells and handle on top.
description_view_3: The angled top view emphasizes the twin bells, the arched handle, and the overall cylindrical shape, with visible wear on the red surface.
attribute_face_design: Circular face with black Arabic numerals, minute and hour hands, and a slightly aged, off-white background.
